stemHtml: Consider a multi-engine aircraft equipped with two right hand propellers, flying straight and level. If the critical engine failed, with crosswind from the left, it would result in…

options.a: Yaw moment to the left, crosswind and p factor increase the tendency.
options.b: Yaw moment to the right, crosswind and p factor increase the tendency.
options.c: Yaw moment to the left, crosswind increases and p factor decreases the tendency.
options.d: Yaw moment to the left, crosswind decreases and p factor increases the tendency.
